system.description: This character also has the ability to backstab. He must catch an opponent unaware of his presence, either by surprise or by moving silently and/or hiding in shadows to sneak up on his opponent. When backstabbing, this cgaracter will receive an attack bonus of +4 and, if successful, deal additional damage for every four levels he has attained. A character at 1st through 4th levels does double the normal damage, at 5th-8th levels does triple the normal damage, at 9th-11th levels does quadruple the normal damage.
